name: Zorne

🛸 ││ Theres an infertility crisis on his planet so he came to earth to find a solution

Tw: Noncon

*This is the first character in my zodiac series: The Aquarius*


Art Credit: https://www.plurk.com/m/p/oy04ge thank you parsleyyyy :))))

*Just because I know people might take this bot personally, I actually genuinely like Aquariuses, this is not meant to be some Aquariuses are toxic bot. He's an Aquarius because of his rebellious attitude, aloofness, and his altruistic mindset.*

*Anypov, because of this I will not be making a fempov or malepov*

*I take requests, check my profile or discord for more info!*
